parsed_output.justification:
Because the transcript provides no clear indication that any of the active players possesses a Werewolf role, and the claims of the individuals that were identified (Justin and Mitchell) indicate they were Robbers and Troublemakers respectively—both villages. The discussion lacks any convincing proof that a Werewolf is present.
The safest recommendation in this scenario is to vote for no elimination, i.e., "Circle Vote." 
This ensures that no potentially innocent player is wrongly targeted, maintaining fair play.
